title: Uniface Messages 6000-6999
text: Uniface Messages 6000-6999 Refer to the Uniface message number, message text, and an explanation of the message. The following table refers to messages with numbering between 6000 - 6999 . Search: Column Message number Message text Explanation Filter results... 381 rows found Message number Message text Explanation Filter 381 rows found Filter 381 rows found Filter 381 rows found Message number Message text Explanation 6001 Memory allocation error. Insufficient memory allocated in 3GL. 6153 Store error on save. A store error occurred when you saved. Contact your system administrator. 6200 Specify the language. You must specify the language when you create, compile or delete a global object. 6201 Apply field template TemplateName to field FieldName? Click OK to apply a field template to the selected field. 6205 No identification or context specified. Specify the object name or context. 6206 Incorrect menu type; cascading/included menu must be a menu. You specified a menu bar name instead of a menu name in the Menu Name entry. Specify the name of the menu you want to define, ensuring it is the correct menu. 6208 Delete last occurrence? Uniface prompts you for confirmation before deleting the last occurrence of an object. Click OK to delete the last occurrence from the database; click Cancel to cancel the operation. 6209 Logon failed, incorrect username or password. Do you want to quit or retry? You entered an incorrect user name or password when logging on to Uniface. Check with your system administrator to ensure that you are defined as a user in the Permission Control System. 6210 Do you want to delete, %%$$UP_5 Entities, %%$$UP_4 Subtypes, %%$$UP_0 Fields, %%$$UP_1 Keys/Indexes, %%$$UP_2 Relationships, %%$$UP_6 Relationships with Subtypes. Choose Delete to delete the specified entities, fields, and so on. 6212 Superentity does not exist. You tried a Save As operation on a nonexistent superentity. Check the spelling of the superentity. 6213 Do you want to delete %%$$UP_0 forms with %%$$UP_1 entities, %%$$UP_2 fields and %%$$UP_3 component variables? Choose Delete to delete the specified components, entities, fields and variables. 6214 List of workbenches not found. This message indicates an installation problem. The list of workbench abbreviations are stored in the message FLIST_WRKB , which is supplied with the standard Uniface installation. 6215 Old frame types found. Do you want to convert? Uniface detected old frame types: P for push button and C for check box. These were imported from a previous version of Uniface. Click OK to convert the old frames to new widget types. 6216 No property form found for %%$$UP_MES1 widget on %%$$UP_MES2%%%. A custom widget property form (a form not included in the standard Uniface forms delivered at installation) cannot be found. The name of the widget form and GUI type used are displayed. 6217 You must enter a bitmap name when Source Feedback = Bitmap. You set the Source Feedback to Bitmap. Enter the name of the bitmap for the drag-and-drop widget in the Bitmap entry. 6218 This file already exists. Replace existing file? The file you chose for import or export already exists. If you confirm, the existing file is overwritten. 6219 Menu bar and menu cannot have identical names. You cannot choose the same name for a menu and menu bar. 6220 No list of start forms found for workbench %%$$UP_1%%%. Indicates an installation problem. The list of start forms is stored in the message FLIST_SFRM , which is supplied with the standard Uniface installation. 6221 Start form does not exist. The form name you entered was not in the standard list of start forms supplied by Uniface. Enter the correct name, or check message FLIST_SFRM_workbench from the Editors > Library > Messages menu in the Model Editor. 6244 No fields found. You tried to use Load Fields on a component entity. Load Fields only loads fields for entities defined in an application model. Component entities do not belong to an application model. 6245 Cannot update interface definition, data type or database characteristic of a model-defined field. Apply field template %%$$UP_1 to remaining properties of field %%$$UP_2? In the Component Fields form, you cannot update the interface definition or data type of fields defined at model level. You can only update these properties for component-level fields. In addition, you cannot change the database characteristics of a field if it is a database field. Click OK to update the remaining field properties with the field template. 6246 One or more fields are wider than the maximum component width (340 characaters) The combined width of fields on the component cannot exceed 340 characters. 6247 Text is too large to fit in edit box. Edit box is set to read-only. The text for this field exceeded the maximum specified for the edit box. The field is truncated and the edit box is set to read-only so that the truncated text is not saved to the database. Only the original text is saved. 6248 Specify the %%$$UP_MESS1 name. You must specify the object name to perform the specified action. 6249 Action not allowed on this object. The global action you tried to perform is not valid for the specified object. For example, you cannot perform Clean up on a global ProcScript. 6250 Modification of model default not allowed. You tried to change a property of a modeled component entity or field that cannot be midfield in the component. For example, the Database Interface or Data Type of modeled objects cannot be changed in a component that inherits them. 6251 Field list not available for dummy entities. Field lists cannot be built from dummy entities. Field lists are built from entities defined in the model. 6252 No entries found. You started the Entry Scanner in the Trigger Editor, but entries are not present in the current trigger. 6255 Only fields can have widget properties. You activated the Widget Properties option on an entity or area frame. Choose a field and try again. 6256 Entity too small for selected fields. Copy to clipboard or edit selection of fields for Load Fields? The painted entity does not contain sufficient space to use Load Fields. Click Copy to copy the fields to the clipboard. Click Edit to edit the number of fields loaded on the component. Click Cancel to cancel Load Fields and return to the Paint Tableau. 6257 Illegal color number specified. The color number you entered is not within the valid range. Enter a number in the range 0 through 63. 6259 Form name already defined. You entered a form name that has already been defined. Enter another name. 6260 Form name already defined. You tried to use a nonexistent included entity. An included entity must first be defined in an application model. 6261 Cannot change supertype into subtype or subtype into supertype. You cannot change a supertype entity into a subtype, or the other way around. 6262 Entity is not a subtype. The current entity is not defined as a subtype. 6263 Field length must be %%$$UP_MESS1 characters. This field can contain three characters only. Enter the correct number of characters. 6264 Specify a maximum value. You have not specified a maximum value for a spin button widget. Specify a maximum value where the spin button should finish counting. 6265 Specify a minimum value. You have not specified a minimum value for a spin button widget. Specify a minimum value where the spin button should begin counting. 6266 Minimum value is greater than maximum value. You cannot specify a minimum value that is greater than the maximum value. Specify a correct minimum value. 6267 Do you want to delete the mapping for %%$$UP_1 mapped tables and %%$$UP_2 mapped fields? Click OK to delete the specified number of mapped tables and fields. 6268 Do you want to delete the mapped tables containing %%$$UP_1 mapped fields? Click OK to delete the selected mapped tables with the specified number of mapped fields. 6269 You have defined updates in both Property Updates and Trigger Updates components. Do you want to apply all updates or only the updates for the current action? 6271 Included menu already used at a higher level. These message warns you that you are already using the included menu. You cannot define an included menu within itself. 6272 Delete not allowed, menu still in use as Referenced Menu in menu%%$$UP_MESS1%%%. You cannot delete a menu if it is defined in a menu or menu bar. First delete the menu from the menu tree. 6273 No modification allowed. Use New for new occurrence. You cannot modify this occurrence. You can only add new occurrences. 6275 Menu name must be entered. You must specify the menu name when defining a menu, menu bar, title or cascading/included menu item. 6276 Item name must be entered. You must specify a name when defining a menu item. 6277 You cannot edit window properties for included menus. Included menus do not have window properties. 6278 Perform Global Update? If you click OK , the update is performed. The updates are not stored in the database until you click Close from the form. If you click Quit , your updates are not saved. 6280 Component Header Depth too large; value set to Component Depth. You entered a component header depth that exceeds the component depth; in this case, the header depth is automatically set to the component depth. 6281 Cannot edit widget properties. You tried to start up the Widget Maintenance form when the widget type was not specified or did not contain widget properties you can set (for example, unifield widget types). 6282 Delete %%$$UP_MESS1: %%$$UP_MESS2%%%? Uniface prompts you before performing a multiple delete operation from a Global Updates form. Click Yes to delete the specified entities one at a time. Click Yes to All to delete all the entities retrieved in one operation. Click No to skip an entity and go to the next entity. Click Cancel to cancel the operation. 6283 Cannot set this option if Overlay is set. You cannot set the specified option if the Overlay option is set on. 6284 Cannot set this option when Caption is not set. Click Caption on and try again. 6287 Do you want to delete %%$$UP_5 Subtype, %%$$UP_2 relationships? This message prompts for confirmation to delete a number of subtypes and relationships. 6288 Could not create occurrence; creocc status: [%%$$UP_MESS1%%%]. Check the error codes returned in $status . 6289 Could not remove occurrence; remocc status: [%%$$UP_MESS1%%%]. Check the $status , and the error codes returned for remocc . 6293 No menu items found for cascading menu. Remove the menu and redefine it. The menu items for the cascading menu do not exist in your repository. Remove references for the cascading menu from the menu bar and redefine the cascading menu. 6294 You cannot define accelerator keys for cascaded menus. You cannot define accelerator keys for cascading menus because an accelerator key initiates an action. A cascading menu activates a menu only. 6295 Your accelerator key definition will be lost! Continue? If you change a menu item into a cascading menu, previously defined accelerator keys are no longer valid. If you click Continue , the accelerator key definition is deleted. 6296 Cannot open more than two workbenches. You cannot open more than two workbenches simultaneously. 6300 Do you want to delete %%$$UP_2%%% signature with %%$$UP_1%%% operations and %%$$UP_0%%% parameters? Click Delete or Cancel . 6301 Do you want to delete %%$$UP_1%%% operations and %%$$UP_0%%% parameters. Click Delete or Cancel . 6302 No parameters allowed for %%$$UP_MESS1%%% operation. You cannot define for the accept or quit operations. 6303 Operation %%$$UP_MESS1%%% already exists. Self explanatory. 6304 Deletion of reserved operation %%$$UP_MESS1%%% not allowed. You cannot delete reserved operations. 6305 Constructed parameters not allowed in combination with basic parameters. You cannot combine constructed parameters with basic parameters. Define one or more basic parameters or define one constructed parameters. 6306 Only one constructed parameter allowed. You cannot define more than one constructed parameter. You can define one or more basic parameters. 6307 %%$$UP_MESS1%%% is a reserved operation name; use another name. Specify another operation name. 6309 Syntax check successful. Uniface performed a syntax check on all modified triggers for the current edit session and found no syntax errors. 6310 Non-modal form started as modal form in test mode. When you test a non-modal form within the Uniface IDE, it runs as a modal form. To test a non-modal form either: enter /tst FormName from the command line or build a small application and run the form from there. 6311 Component Template %%$$UP_MESS1%%% missing. Uniface could not find the specified component template. Check that it was not deleted. 6312 Tag %%$$UP_MESS1%%% already exists. The polygons will be combined. You created another polygon with a duplicate tag name. The duplicate is added to the existing polygon tag. 6314 Type library generated successfully. You have successfully generated a type library with the Define Type Library form. 6315 Type library not created. The Type Llibrary was not created due to a number of possible reasons. Check that you have enough disk space, memory, and so on. 6316 Changing this property will rebuild the defined tree structure. If you change the property, the tree structure will be rebuilt. 6317 Cannot use role leaf. Item contains children. The role is ‘leaf’ and the item has children. Therefore, this type is not allowed. 6318 Errors were generated during Upgrade Repository. See the message frame. This message is self-explanatory. 6319 The major version number you entered is not valid. The valid range is [1-65535]. This message is self-explanatory. 6321 The minor version number you entered is not valid. The valid range is [0-65535]. This message is self-explanatory. 6322 Cannot start tab page in test mode. You need to test the form that contains the tab page. 6328 Select an HTML skeleton You either have to select an HTML skeleton via the Browse button or type in the filename manually. 6329 Select a CSS stylesheet You either have to select a CSS stylesheet via the Browse button or type in the filename manually. 6330 Incorrect <STYLE> section found in HTML skeleton The <STYLE> section in the HTML skeleton is not properly defined so no style definitions could be extracted. 6331 Incorrect style definitions found in HTML skeleton The style definitions in the HTML skeleton are not properly defined so no style definitions could be extracted. 6332 Incorrect style definitions found in CSS file The style definitions in the CSS file are not properly defined so no style definitions could be extracted. 6333 No <STYLE> section found in HTML skeleton Style definitions which can be extracted by the Browse Style Classes form should be defined within the <STYLE> section. 6334 No style definitions found in HTML Skeleton Please select another file or add style definitions to the HTML skeleton first. 6335 No style definitions found in CSS file Please select another file or add style definitions to the CSS file first. 6336 Incorrect comments section found in HTML Skeleton Some comments in the <STYLE> section of the HTML Skeleton are not properly defined, so no style definitions could be extracted. 6337 Incorrect comments section found in CSS file Some comments in the CSS file are not properly defined so no style definitions could be extracted. 6338 CSS file contains HTML skeleton elements You have selected a CSS file which is not properly defined. In fact, the selectedCSS file might be an HTML skeleton. 6339 CSS file contains HTML elements You have selected a CSS file which is not properly defined. In fact, the selected CSS file might be an HTML file. 6340 No editor is associated with %%$$UP_MESS1%%% files The file of this type is associated with an editor. In Microsoft Windows, you have to create association between file types and programs manually. ($$UP_MESS1 is a CSS stylesheet from the usys.uar message "FLIST_CSS_RAD".) 6930 Cannot start [%%$$UP_MESS1%%%] If you have selected "Start separate Development Environment" in the Test Mode Preferences, Uniface cannot start a separate ide.exe . If you have selected "Start separate Runtime Environment" in the Test Mode Preferences, Uniface cannot start uniface.exe . 6360 Cannot find implicit HTML skeleton data. The ProcScript compiler cannot find an implicit HTML skeleton. Create the layout for the server page, or create an HTML skeleton in Uniface 8 and import the server page again. 6400 A key has not been selected for the one entity. You have not specified a key for the one entity in the relationship. You cannot define the foreign key until you do this. Select a key from the Key drop-down list. 6401 No supertype specified. You did not specify the supertype entity in the subtype definition. Specify the supertype. 6402 No foreign key fields specified. You did not specify foreign key fields for the relationship. Click Detail to specify foreign key fields, or choose File > Quit . 6403 Many entity and one entity have the same name. You cannot define a relationship when the one entity has the same name as the many entity. Check the names that you specified. 6404 Key [$$UP_MESS1]: no key fields specified. You cannot save or delete a key when key fields are not specified. Specify the key fields and try again. 6405 Cannot delete this entity; one of its subtypes is defined as a one entity in a relationship. You cannot delete entities that are defined in relationships. To delete the entity you must first remove it from the relationship. 6406 Cannot delete this entity; it is defined as a one entity in a relationship. You are not allowed to delete an entity when it is defined as a one entity in a relationship. Before you can delete the entity itself, first delete the entity from the relationship. 6407 Maximum number of occurrences must be greater than or equal to minimum number of occurrences. The maximum number of occurrences cannot be less than the minimum number of occurrences allowed for the given entity. 6408 Cannot delete this field, it is used in key or index. If a field is used in a key or index, you cannot delete it unless you first delete it from the key or index. 6409 Cannot delete this field; it is used in a relationship. If a field is used in a relationship, you cannot delete it unless you first delete it from the relationship. 6410 Cannot delete this key; it is used in a relationship. If a key is used in a relationship, you are not allowed to delete a key when it is defined in a relationship. Delete the relationship. 6411 No fields defined for many entity. You must specify fields for the many entity when you define a relationship. 6412 Cannot delete [%%$$UP_MESS1] because it is used in a [%%$$UP_MESS2]. You cannot delete this object because it is used in another model or relationship. A delete restriction prevents you from doing this. 6413 %%$$UP_MESS1 [%%$$UP_MESS2] not found. The object you tried to retrieve does not exist in the database. Check your profile. 6414 Component Entity [%%$$UP_MESS1%%.%%$$UP_MESS2%%%] has been reloaded. This message is displayed whenever an entity was reloaded after a lock and a resulting reload action in a multi-user environment (where two people try to edit the same component on a shared database). 6415 Component Field [%%$$UP_MESS1%%%.%%$$UP_MESS2%%%.%%$$UP_MESS3$%%%] has been reloaded. This message is displayed whenever a field is reloaded after a lock and a resulting reload action in a multi-user environment (where two people try to edit the same component on a shared database). 6417 Cannot insert/delete $$UP_MESS1, because [$$UP_MESS2] is maintained in the AME. You cannot update your model in the Application Model Manager while you are defining the model in the AME. Return to the AME to continue defining your model, or delete the diagram in the AME to continue defining the model with Model Manager. 6418 Cannot change supertype, because [%%$$UP_MESS1] is maintained in the AME. Self-explanatory. 6419 Cannot delete primary key because the primary key is not the last key/index. You tried to delete the primary key. You can only do this when all other keys or indexes are deleted. 6420 Wildcards not allowed. You cannot use a wildcard as the name of a new object. 6421 Maximum field length: [$$UP_MESS1] characters. You exceeded the maximum number of characters allowed for this field. Specify a smaller length. 6422 Specify the %%$$UP_MESS1 name. You tried to open or create an object without specifying a name. 6424 Datatype "handle" | "struct" is only allowed for non-database fields. Handles and structs are not persistent so the datatypes handle and struct , and are only allowed for fields whose Characteristics property is Non-database . 6425 Specify the %%$$UP_MESS1%%%. You tried to open or create an object without specifying the version or branch. 6426 Cannot delete this model; it contains a one entity in an intermodel relationship. You tried to delete a model that contains one entity defined in an intermodel relationship. You cannot delete the model unless you remove the one entity from the relationship. 6427 Intermodel relationship between %%$UP_MESS1 and %%$$UP_MESS2 could not be created. The relationship could not be created due to a size limitation for the key definition. To create the relationship successfully, your key must comprise four fields (for example, ENTITY1.MODEL1.ENTITY2.MODEL2). Your DBMS does not support a four-field key for the relationship definition. 6428 Data type is not compatible with interface, syntax or layout definitions. Do you want to set the default definitions for this datatype? The data type that you specified is not compatible with the interface, syntax or layout definitions. To reset the default for the data type, click Default . Click Cancel to leave the data type unchanged so you can modify the definition yourself. If the data type is not valid when you store the definition, the default is used. 6429 Nonvalid component behavior. Self-explanatory. 6430 Option “%%$sub” is not included in the SEK code. You cannot use certain Uniface functions if they are not included in your Software Enable Key. Contact your Uniface representative. 6431 Loading component %%$$UP_MESS1%%%…. The component is currently loading. 6432 No entity/model specified. You tried to rename a field that is not in an entity, or the model for that entity had not been specified. Specify the entity or model name. 6433 If you choose to apply a template to this component, you will lose all existing trigger code, local variables, and local constants for the component. Are you sure you want to apply a template? When components have been modeled and registered as having a Uniface component implementation, it is not possible to attach component templates at a later stage, that is, when implementing the actual Uniface component implementation. If you click Yes , a browse form opens for template selection. When you have selected a template, the existing form is deleted, a new form is created using the template, and the Entity Binding form appears. 6434 Use a Component Template? Click Yes to use a predefined template to build your component. 6435 The menu type is not specified. Specify whether the menu is a menu bar or a drop-down menu. 6437 %%$$UP_MESS1 not allowed for %%$$UP_MESS2%%%. The action you chose is not allowed for the object you selected. 6438 Specify the activation URL. HTML forms with a Fill-Out facility must contain a Web location (URL). 6439 No fields found. The fields you specified could not be found. You entered them incorrectly, or they do not exist. 6440 Entity %%$$UP_MESS1 not found. You tried to retrieve and rename a nonexistent entity. 6441 No down entities for %%$$UP_MESS1%%%. You tried to rename nonexistent down entities. 6442 No up entities for %%$$UP_MESS1%%%. You tried to rename nonexistent up entities. 6443 Load Fields failed. Load Fields was unable to load the fields you requested due to an internal error. This is due to either a memory problem (you may be running too many applications simultaneously), or to an internal Uniface error. If quitting other applications does not solve the problem, contact your Uniface representative. 6444 No fields selected. Select fields or click Cancel. You tried to use a Load Fields command without selecting the appropriate fields. Click Select (above the field check boxes) to select all fields, or click the check boxes on for the fields you want to load. 6445 Run %%$$UP_MESS1 done (status=%%$$UP_MESS2, result=%%$$UP_MESS3%%%). This message appears after you have tested a component. It displays the name of the component and the $status and $result returned. 6447 Cannot use AME for rename. In the component editor, you tried to rename an entity that is defined in the Application Model Editor. You must rename the entity from the AME. 6448 Model field width = %%$$UP_MESS1%%%. Compare the width of the model field with the width of the painted field. 6449 Entity %%$$UP_MESS1 not found, no fields available. You cannot load fields from an entity that does not belong to a model, that is, the entity is a dummy entity. Load Fields only works for entities defined in a model. 6450 Component definition was modified since last compilation. Do you want to test or compile before testing? Self-explanatory. 6451 Loading component fields…. Load Fields is loading fields on the Paint Tableau. 6452 %%$$UP_MESS1 not entered. You did not specify the component library in the component properties or the application shell. Specify your own library or the global library SYSTEM_LIBRARY in the Define Component Properties and Define Start-up Shell forms. 6453 Not allowed to select included entity. You cannot select an included entity for Load Fields. You must paint included entities manually. 6454 Component specific properties of field %%$$UP_MESS1%%%.%%$$UP_MESS2%%%.%%$$UP_MESS3 will not be copied. Continue? The field you are renaming has properties that are defined at component level. These properties are not associated with the field after it is renamed. 6455 Component specific properties of entity %%$$UP_MESS1.%%$$UP_MESS2 will not be copied. Continue? The entity you are renaming has properties defined at component level. These properties are not associated with the entity after it is renamed. 6456 Copy component specific properties of field %%$$UP_MESS1%%%.%%$$UP_MESS2%%%.%%$$UP_MESS3%%%? The field you are renaming has properties defined at the component level. To copy these properties to the new field after it is renamed, click Yes . 6457 Copy form specific properties of entity %%$$UP_MESS1%%%.%%$$UP_MESS2%%%? The entity you are renaming has properties defined at component level. To copy these properties to the new entity after it is renamed, click Yes . 6458 Copy form specific properties of entity %%$$UP_MESS1.%%$$UP_MESS2 and its fields? Both the entity you are renaming and its fields have properties defined at component level. To copy these properties to the new entity after it is renamed, click Yes to All . To confirm each of the relevant fields separately, click Yes . 6460 Repository version initialized. Your previous repository version was successfully initialized. 6461 Incompatible Repository version %%$$UP_MESS1 (expected version %%$$UP_MESS2). If you continue your database can be corrupted. You are running a repository version that is incompatible with the current repository. You should upgrade your repository version before continuing. 6462 Identical names for application model one and many entities. The names of your entities are identical. Check the names of your entities. 6463 Internal Component Editor error (out of memory?). An internal error occurred in the component editor, possibly due to lack of memory. Contact your system administrator. 6464 New frame cannot overlap existing frame. You cannot paint overlapping field or entity frames. 6465 A label for this field does not exist. You chose the Select Label option for a field which does not have a label. 6466 A field for this label does not exist. You chose the Select Field option for a label which does not have a field linked to it. 6467 Label already has a name. Do you want to rename it? The label you specified is already associated with a field, click OK to rename the field. 6468 A label already exists for the field. The field already has a label. Choose Select Label to view the label name. 6469 The border setting has positioned a frame illegally in relation to the highlighted frame. You selected a group of items to create borders. A border occupies the same space as an area frame. This can cause the dimensions and positions of frames to change. Apply a border to one frame at a time. 6470 Unable to copy. The component editor was unable to copy objects to the clipboard. Check if your objects were selected. 6471 Unable to paste. The component editor was unable to paste objects to the clipboard. Check the contents of the clipboard. 6472 You are about to delete an entity that is not empty, continue? You are about to delete an entity that contains definitions. If you click Delete , all definitions in that entity are also deleted. 6473 Component geometry is too large, size truncated. The Uniface compiler allows a maximum component area of 8000 characters. If you have dragged a frame out of this limit, the frame is truncated. 6474 Text will be truncated, continue? You are converting a label into component text. Component text does not support proportioned character spacing, and the text in the label no longer fits the current layout. This can occur because the text is wider than the component area, or because a field frame is in the way. If you choose to continue, your label text is truncated to fit the available space and the excess text is lost. 6475 Cannot insert frame before Page Header. Apart from text and lines, header frames must be the first object on a component. You are not allowed to create a new frame before you create a header frame. Only text and line frames can be created. 6476 Cannot insert new frame after Page Trailer/Break. Apart from text and lines, trailers and break frames must be the last object on a component. You cannot create a new frame after you have created a trailer or break frame; only text and line frames can be created. 6477 New text too large for available frame area. Previous text retained. While editing a text frame, the new text you entered was too large for the space that is currently available. Your new text was ignored. 6478 No matching objects found. No objects were found to match the specified search criteria. 6479 Do you want to delete %%$$UP_MESS1%%% shortcuts? Confirm or cancel your action to delete the specified shortcuts. Only the shortcut is deleted, not the actual object. 6480 Specified %%$$UP_MESS1%%% %%$$UP_MESS2%%% does not exist. Create new %%$$UP_MESS1%%%? Click Yes to create the new object in your repository; click No to cancel. 6481 Cannot create component because it already exists as another component type. The component already exists as another component type. Use another name. 6482 Shortcut created. The shortcut was created successfully. 6483 Insufficient space for new shortcut. You cannot create a new shortcut because the current workspace is full. You can display a maximum of 37 shortcuts in the workspace. 6484 Failed to create shortcut. See the message frame for more information. 6485 Shortcut no longer valid. You migrated your application, therefore your shortcuts are no longer valid and you must re-create them. 6486 Drop-down %%$$UP_MESS1%%% successfully created. The drop-down menu definition was successfully created. 6498 Error in HTML skeleton file. No additional information about the cause of the error is available. 6499 Error in HTML skeleton file at line %%$$SUB%%%. This message is self-explanatory. 6500 %%$$SUB was expected. Supply the specified object. 6501 An HTML attribute was expected. Supply the attribute. 6502 An HTML attribute or ">" was expected. Supply the attribute or the close angle bracket (> ) delimiter. 6503 The NAME attribute in the %%$SUB tag is missing or incorrect. A NAME attribute is mandatory with the <X-ITERATE> or <X-SUBST> tags. 6504 Attributes other than NAME and MAX not allowed in <X-ITERATE> tag. You can only use the NAME and MAX attributes with the <X-ITERATE> tag. 6505 </X-ITERATE> encountered without a matching <X-ITERATE>. <X-ITERATE> must be followed by </X-ITERATE> . 6506 <X-SUBST> and <X-ITERATE> tags cannot be nested within <X-SUBST> tag. You cannot insert a <X-SUBST> or <X-ITERATE> tag between <X-SUBST> and </X-SUBST>. 6509 </X-SUBST> encountered without a matching <X-SUBST>. <X-SUBST> must be followed by </X-SUBST>. 6510 Cannot nest iterations of the same entity. If you nest <X-ITERATE> tags, you must specify different entities. 6511 <X-SUBST> tag has nonvalid TYPE. The <X-SUBST> tag can only have the type VALUE, HTML, TEXT, TEXTAREA, CHECKBOX, SUBMIT, RADIO, SELECT, or FUNCTION. 6512 Application terminated. The application terminated because it was not defined as a display-only document. The final HTML document generated by Uniface must always be display-only, and you must explicitly define this. 6513 Click here to restart. The final HTML document generated by Uniface must always be a display-only document. This can be explicitly programmed. Click the hyperlink to restart the document. 6514 Error occurred. An error occurred during parsing or output generation. 6515 Click here to view the message frame. An error occurred during parsing or output generation. For more information, click the hyperlink to view the message frame. 6516 Cannot write to output file. The webgen statement failed to generate an output file because the disk was full or you do not have write permissions. 6517 Cannot send data to Web Application Server. The Uniface application was unable to send data to the Web Application Server because the Web Application Server has probably terminated. 6518 Cannot generate image file. The image file could not be created in the cookie directory for one of the following reasons: The image in the database is corrupted. The image format is incompatible. You do not have write permission. 6519 The submitted form is not the most recent. Form has been resent. You pressed a button on a form in your Web browser that was not the most recent form you received from the Uniface application. This is not allowed. Most likely, you have used the ‘Back’ function of your browser. The most recent form has been resent, so you can continue with the form that the browser is currently showing. 6520 <X-OVERWRITE> encountered without a matching </X-OVERWRITE>. You must use matching <X-OVERWRITE> and </X-OVERWRITE> tags. 6521 Web deployment not possible: non-web widget types used. The export of the object was successful. 6941 Repository mismatch. Import file is incompatible with the current repository version. The repository is versioned, so it is not possible to import data that has been exported from a version of the repository that is too old, or that is newer than the current repository version. For example, you cannot import data from Uniface 8 directly into Uniface 10. You must first migrate to a supported version of Uniface 9. 6942 Repository mismatch. It is not possible to append data from the current repository version to an export file with another repository version. Repository versions must match. The repository is versioned, so it is not possible to import data that has been exported from a version of the repository that is too old, or that is newer than the current repository version. For the same reason, the export file can only contain data from a single compatible repository. 6943 The Copy action is not allowed to append data to a Uniface export file. The export file repository contains repository version. The Copy action is used to copy application data. It is not intended for exporting Repository definitions. To append data to an export file, use the Export functionality. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
